ASIProxyTargetContract.description: Protocol-relative ASI-proxy target, not an unobserved ASI proof claim.
ASIProxyTargetContract.title: ASIProxyTargetContract

AgentIdentityAttestation.description: Signed statement that binds an agent identity to finite evidence.
AgentIdentityAttestation.title: AgentIdentityAttestation

AgentIdentityCheckReport.description: Fail-closed verification report for identity or attestation evidence.
AgentIdentityCheckReport.title: AgentIdentityCheckReport

AgentIdentityStrength.description: Protocol-relative strength of an agent identity assertion.
AgentIdentityStrength.title: AgentIdentityStrength

AgentPolicyIdentity.description: Policy identity for one member of a fixed ECPT agent population.
AgentPolicyIdentity.title: AgentPolicyIdentity

CapabilityPacketCandidate.description: An observable artifact that may become an ECPT capability packet.
CapabilityPacketCandidate.title: CapabilityPacketCandidate

CapabilityPacketRegistry.description: Deterministic packet registry for an ECPT packet ecology run.
CapabilityPacketRegistry.title: CapabilityPacketRegistry

ClaimStatus.description: Protocol-relative status labels used by ECPT, BIT, TRC, SQOT, and ALT.
ClaimStatus.title: ClaimStatus

CryptographicAgentIdentity.description: Public-key-backed identity for an agent inside a declared protocol.
CryptographicAgentIdentity.title: CryptographicAgentIdentity

EdgeWitness.description: Finite witness that one or more packets support another packet or receiver.
EdgeWitness.title: EdgeWitness

FixedPopulationLedger.description: Finite ledger asserting fixed agent identities and no self-rewrite.
FixedPopulationLedger.title: FixedPopulationLedger

IdentityContributionStatus.description: How identity evidence may contribute to runtime packet capital.
IdentityContributionStatus.title: IdentityContributionStatus

IdentityTrustProfile.description: Operational trust profile for protocol-relative identity checks.
IdentityTrustProfile.title: IdentityTrustProfile

Ledger.description: A finite typed ledger with explicit coordinate kinds.
Ledger.title: Ledger

LedgerCoordinate.description: One typed coordinate in a finite certificate ledger.
LedgerCoordinate.title: LedgerCoordinate

ProtocolFrameDigest.description:
Finite digest of the declared ECPT protocol frame.

The digest fixes the observation window, validity domain, allowed packet
sources, and route catalog used by hidden-capability-injection checks.  It
is a protocol identity record, not a proof of physical outcomes.
ProtocolFrameDigest.title: ProtocolFrameDigest

RuntimeEvent.description: Append-only runtime event for audit and replay.
RuntimeEvent.title: RuntimeEvent

RuntimeEventLog.description: Deterministic event log with aggregate hash.
RuntimeEventLog.title: RuntimeEventLog

RuntimeState.description: Persistent runtime state for one ECPT active agent session.
RuntimeState.title: RuntimeState

SybilResistanceLedger.description: Population-level Sybil-resistance judgment and residual ledger.
SybilResistanceLedger.title: SybilResistanceLedger

SybilResistancePolicy.description: Population-level policy for protocol-relative Sybil resistance.

allow_homogeneous_fleet_with_unique_keys.title: Allow Homogeneous Fleet With Unique Keys

require_distinct_role_or_worker_index_fo.title: Require Distinct Role Or Worker Index For Fleet

SybilResistancePolicy.title: SybilResistancePolicy

VerifiedCapabilityPacket.description: Finite-scope reusable packet capital after verifier and edge checks.
VerifiedCapabilityPacket.title: VerifiedCapabilityPacket

VerifierResolution.description: Adapter-route resolution result that preserves safe failure behavior.
VerifierResolution.title: VerifierResolution

description: Population-level ECPT runtime state for collective phase certificates.
